title: ornithogalum regale
intro: Ornithogalum regale, also known as the Queen's Ornithogalum, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asparagaceae family, native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to reduce swelling and combat bacterial and fungal infections. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Ornithogalum regale is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
